caption: The video depicts a group of medical professionals, likely students or trainees, seated in a classroom or training environment during an event called "Sim Week." They are dressed in scrubs and surgical caps, with face masks covering their mouths and noses, indicating a focus on hygiene and safety. Each individual is holding papers, possibly containing instructions or case studies, suggesting they are engaged in a simulation exercise or educational session. The setting includes a whiteboard and a screen displaying content related to their activity, reinforcing the educational context. The participants appear attentive and focused, with one person adjusting their mask, highlighting the importance of proper personal protective equipment (PPE) use. The overall atmosphere suggests a structured learning experience aimed at preparing them for real-world medical scenarios.
